summary: Completed testing of Technical Review and Certification Decision (BAC-F6-15) feature. Backend: 18/18 tests passed (100%). Frontend: Page loads, stats cards display, all modals (Create, View, Edit, Decision, Approve) working correctly with Y/N dropdowns for checklist items.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <select>/<tbody> - non-critical development warning

critical_code_review_comments: Good implementation: Auto-certificate generation when decision is 'issue_certificate' and review is approved
Default checklist with 22 items covering General, Application, Quotation, Man Days, Audit Team, Stage 1, Stage 2, Other categories
Proper status flow: draft -> under_review -> decision_made -> approved/certificate_issued
PDF generation working with bilingual (Arabic/English) support
Existing test record with CERT-2026-0002 confirms certificate auto-generation is working

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all major flows working, minor React hydration warnings)

seed_data_creation: Created test technical reviews during backend testing (cleaned up). Existing record with certificate CERT-2026-0002 remains.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Technical Review (BAC-F6-15) feature fully tested. Key workflow: Create review (from Stage 2 or manual) -> Update checklist items -> Make decision (issue_certificate/reject/needs_review) -> Approve (auto-generates certificate if decision was issue_certificate). PDF generation works. Sidebar navigation at route /technical-reviews.

endpoints_verified.GET /api/technical-reviews: WORKING - Lists all reviews with optional status filter
endpoints_verified.POST /api/technical-reviews: WORKING - Creates review with default 22-item checklist
endpoints_verified.GET /api/technical-reviews/{id}: WORKING - Returns review with checklist items
endpoints_verified.PUT /api/technical-reviews/{id}: WORKING - Updates review including checklist items
endpoints_verified.POST /api/technical-reviews/{id}/approve: WORKING - Approves review and auto-generates certificate if decision=issue_certificate

frontend_verified.Page load: WORKING - Stats cards show (Total, Draft, Under Review, Decision Made, Certificate Issued)
frontend_verified.Create modal: WORKING - Supports 'From Stage 2 Report' and 'Manual Entry' modes
frontend_verified.View modal: WORKING - Shows checklist with Y/N values and remarks
frontend_verified.Edit modal: WORKING - Editable checklist with Y/N dropdowns (22 items)
frontend_verified.Decision modal: WORKING - 3 radio options: Issue Certificate, Reject, Needs Review
frontend_verified.Approve modal: WORKING - Confirms approver name and date, shows auto-cert message
frontend_verified.PDF download: WORKING - Download button present and functional

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real, no mocking
